question:
A vendor conducting a pilot program with your organization contacts you for organizational data to use in a prototype. How should you respond?
(CLASSIFIED DATA)
canonical_answer: Ensure that any cameras, microphones, and Wi-Fi embedded in the laptop are physically disabled.

appears_in.title: Navy Cyber Awareness Challenge 2023
appears_in.answer: Ensure that any cameras, microphones, and Wi-Fi embedded in the laptop are physically disabled.
